creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback



Hi, Christiano! 

Initially, I thought there are some compilation errors in your report, 
but after looking closer into it it seems that you have corrupted 
installation of the libiconv(or there is other reason, why samba port 
can't find iconv.h). 

Can you, please, try to check that you have /usr/local/include/iconv.h 
in place? and if it's not there - try to reinstall libiconv port. 

With regards, Timur Bakeyev.
